trajectory.reasoning: WHAT YOU FOUND: Order #000000515 shows Order Status = Complete, Qty Shipped = 1, Total Paid = $166.36, Total Refunded = $0.00. The Comments History section contains no staff notes, no delivery confirmation, no fraud alert resolution entry, and no reference to Case #992. WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Admin Order View → ORDER VIEW → Comments History tab (http://localhost:7780/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/515#order_comments) and Order Totals/Items Ordered sections on the same page. WHY IT MATTERS: The customer claims non-receipt and references a resolved fraud alert (Case #992) and verified work address, but there are no staff notes or comments documenting the fraud case, address verification, or delivery confirmation. Without documented evidence in Comments History, approving or denying a refund cannot be justified; escalation is required to investigate shipment proof, fraud case #992, and address verification before processing a credit memo.
